title: Grafana Plugin Installation and Version Mismatch Detection
app: Grafana HA pair with synchronized plugins, config management diff to Splunk
spl:
index=observability (sourcetype="grafana:log" OR sourcetype="grafana:audit")
| search plugin OR "plugin*version"
| rex field=_raw "(?i)plugin[=_](?<plugin_id>[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)"
| eval ver=coalesce(plugin_version, version)
| stats values(ver) as versions, dc(ver) as ver_dc, latest(_time) as t by plugin_id, host
| where ver_dc > 1
| sort -ver_dc
description: Highly available Grafana clusters with skewed plugin versions produce phantom panel errors that reproduce on one node only. Comparing reported plugin versions across hosts catches incomplete rollouts before users open tickets.
value: Eliminates flaky dashboard behavior during rolling upgrades and supports change audit evidence.
implementation: Augment with nightly API scrape `/api/plugins` ingested as JSON with `sourcetype=grafana:plugins`. Alert when `ver_dc>1` for `plugin_id` in the same `stack` field. Exclude dev hosts via lookup.
visualization: Table (plugin × host × version), Treemap of drift count, timeline of plugin audit actions.
grandmaExplanation: We watch our primary metrics and dashboard platform for query errors, slow views, and changes that could break the screens teams use every day.
knownFalsePositives: Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.
